title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为象征，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: obra/superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，强调其有效性。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform
native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以帮助用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码助手的代理框架性能优化系统，涵盖技能、直觉、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond
The agent harness performance optimization system

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，旨在让用户快速上手并运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 库的 Stable Diffusion 网页界面，提供了图像生成、编辑和多种模型支持的功能。
highlights: 基于 Gradio 库的网页界面
支持多种 Stable Diffusion 模型
提供图像生成和编辑功能

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
summary: f/prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让社区分享、发现和收集 ChatGPT 提示词，支持自托管以保护隐私。
highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.
Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: Anomalyco/OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: huggingface/transformers
content: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
summary: Hugging Face Transformers 是一个先进的机器学习模型定义框架，支持文本、视觉、音频和多模态模型的推理与训练。
highlights: state-of-the-art machine learning models
text, vision, audio, and multimodal models
for both inference and training

title: I believe there are entire companies right now under AI psychosis
summary: Mitchellh 认为当前许多公司正陷入 AI 精神病状态，即过度狂热地追逐 AI 技术而失去理性判断。
highlights: I believe there are entire companies right now under AI psychosis
过度狂热地追逐 AI 技术而失去理性判断

title: Amazon workers under pressure to up their AI usage are making up tasks
content: Article URL: https://www.fastcompany.com/91541586/amazon-workers-pressured-to-up-ai-use-extraneous-tasks Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48148337 Points: 353 # Comments: 395
summary: 亚马逊员工因被施压增加AI使用量而被迫编造任务，以应对公司对AI工具使用率的考核。
highlights: Amazon workers under pressure to up their AI usage are making up tasks
被施压增加AI使用量
编造任务以应对考核

title: Autonomous AI research for nanogpt speedrun
summary: Prime Intellect 展示了自主 AI 研究在 nanogpt 速度跑中的应用，通过自动化优化加速 GPT 训练。
highlights: Autonomous AI research for nanogpt speedrun
Prime Intellect 的自动化优化方法

title: What Coding Is Starting to Lose
summary: 文章探讨了编程领域正在失去的一些核心价值，如深度思考、创造力和社区协作，并反思了现代开发实践中的潜在问题。
highlights: 编程正在失去深度思考的机会
现代工具可能削弱了创造力
社区协作的重要性被忽视

title: How sales teams use Codex
content: See how sales teams can use Codex to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.
summary: 本文介绍了销售团队如何利用Codex从实际工作输入中生成管道简报、会议准备包、预测审查、客户计划和停滞交易诊断。
highlights: 销售团队可以使用Codex创建管道简报
Codex帮助生成会议准备包
Codex支持预测审查和客户计划
Codex可用于停滞交易诊断

title: How business operations teams use Codex
content: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
summary: 本文介绍了业务运营团队如何利用Codex从实际工作输入中创建倡议简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等文档。
highlights: 业务运营团队可以使用Codex创建倡议简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等。
Codex能够从实际工作输入中生成多种业务文档。

title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
summary: IBM 发布 Granite Embedding Multilingual R2 模型，支持 32K 上下文长度，采用 Apache 2.0 开源协议，在子 100M 参数规模的多语言嵌入模型中达到最优检索质量。
highlights: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context
Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality

title: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
summary: 本文探讨了在连续批处理（continuous batching）中实现异步处理的方法，旨在提升推理系统的吞吐量和资源利用率。文章分析了同步批处理的瓶颈，并提出了异步调度、请求队列和动态批处理等策略，以解锁并发能力。
highlights: Continuous batching can be enhanced with asynchronous processing to avoid idle GPU time.
Asynchronous scheduling allows overlapping computation and data transfer.
Dynamic batching with request queues improves overall system efficiency.
